active_patch: Patch 150 — Live Apply Eligibility Gate v2

build_sequence.purpose: Base command surface, scoped reads, patch gates, audit chain, rollback discipline.

build_sequence.title: Corpus and source authority foundations

build_sequence.purpose: Make Forge show the full build path with current, next, deferred, and blocked work.

deferred_items.reason: Deferred and excluded from canonical lockfile; visible in deferred repair queue for later dependency/sandbox repair.

plain_english: Live apply eligibility v2 gives Forge a single read-only go/no-go surface. It does not authorize writes; it records why no live apply is eligible until snapshot, sandbox, rollback, and human approval evidence exists.
